metadata.description: Marketplace of Claude Code / Cowork plugins for preparing U.S. court documents — one plugin per state plus two shared federal reference plugins (claude-legal-federal-laws and claude-legal-immigration-laws). Each plugin ships matter-neutral civil-procedure skills plus subject-matter bundles and verbatim reference corpora; the state plugins depend on claude-legal-federal-laws for the shared federal / UCC / Bankruptcy content, and every plugin depends on document-skills from the anthropic-agent-skills marketplace (github.com/anthropics/skills) for DOCX / PDF / PPTX / XLSX document output. Anthropic's claude-for-legal marketplace (github.com/anthropics/claude-for-legal — practice-area plugins for commercial, privacy, corporate, employment, litigation, IP, and legal-education workflows) is an allowlisted companion marketplace that composes with these plugins. The two shared plugins bundle two free remote MCP servers — CourtListener (mcp.courtlistener.com) and Legal Data Hunter (legaldatahunter.com/mcp) — for on-demand case-law and statute lookup, with dedicated research skills (case-law-research, immigration-case-law) that route the agent to them. Per-plugin detail lives in each plugin's README.md. Currently ten state plugins (WA, OR, CA, CO, IN, NY, OH, TN, MI, AZ) plus the two shared plugins.

plugins.name: claude-legal-federal-laws
plugins.description: Shared federal reference plugin: canonical FDCPA / FCRA / TILA / ECOA / Reg B-Z + RESPA / SCRA / FHA / FTC Telemarketing Sales Rule, the Title 11 Bankruptcy Code, the model UCC, and the Americans with Disabilities Act with its DOJ/EEOC implementing regulations (42 U.S.C. ch. 126; 29 CFR 1630; 28 CFR 35/36 incl. the 2010 ADA Standards) — a dependency of every state plugin, dereferenced from in-tree symlinks at install time; plus a nationwide FCRA consumer credit-report-rights skills layer and an ADA self-help skill (ada-rights), two bundled free MCP servers (CourtListener + Legal Data Hunter), and a case-law-research skill that routes the agent to them for on-demand case-law lookup. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: claude-legal-immigration-laws
plugins.description: Shared U.S. immigration-law plugin: INA (8 U.S.C. ch. 12), 8 CFR + 22 CFR, and the Foreign Affairs Manual mirrored verbatim, plus an EOIR court-rules corpus; an on-demand case-law index for the federal circuits, the Board of Immigration Appeals, and the USCIS AAO, backed by two bundled free MCP servers (CourtListener + Legal Data Hunter) and an immigration-case-law skill that routes the agent to them; and a 12-skill, venue-independent, document-producing self-help layer. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: wa-court-docs
plugins.description: Washington court documents: GR 14 formatting; King / Pierce / Snohomish / Spokane venues + family-law department + county roll-up; six subject bundles (consumer-debt, family-law, landlord-tenant, personal-injury, employment, commercial-disputes) plus a matter-neutral CPA/UDAP skill (Consumer Protection Act, RCW 19.86 — Hangman Ridge), a CEMA (RCW 19.190 anti-spam; Brown v. Old Navy) skill, and a federal-court venue skill for the U.S. District Court for the Western District of Washington (wa-wawd-pro-se: FRCP + LCR, noting dates, IFP, CM/ECF, Ninth Circuit appeals). Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: or-court-docs
plugins.description: Oregon court documents: UTCR 2.010 formatting; Multnomah + Washington County Circuit Court + county roll-up; ORS 697 / Oregon UTPA consumer-debt bundle. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: ca-court-docs
plugins.description: California court documents: CRC 2.100-2.119 formatting; LASC + SFSC + county roll-up; Rosenthal Act / FDBPA / CDCLA / UCL consumer-debt bundle. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: co-court-docs
plugins.description: Colorado court documents: C.R.C.P. 10 + Chief Justice Directive 11-01 formatting; Denver + Arapahoe + county roll-up; consumer-debt and UDMA family-law bundles. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: in-court-docs
plugins.description: Indiana court documents: Ind. Trial R. 5(E) formatting; Marion + Lake + county roll-up; consumer-debt and family-law bundles (Jarboe summary-judgment standard, T.R. 59 motion-to-correct-error quirk). Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: ny-court-docs
plugins.description: New York court documents: 22 NYCRR § 202.5 / § 202.5-b NYSCEF formatting; five flagship Supreme Court venues plus District / City / Justice / Family / Housing courts; five subject bundles (consumer-debt, landlord-tenant, personal-injury, employment, commercial-disputes). Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: oh-court-docs
plugins.description: Ohio court documents: Ohio Civ. R. 10 + per-court local rules (verbatim Cuyahoga + Delaware Common Pleas); eight Court of Common Pleas venues + municipal-courts + family-court; five subject bundles — consumer-debt, family-law, personal-injury, employment, commercial-disputes. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: tn-court-docs
plugins.description: Tennessee court documents: Tenn. R. Civ. P. 10/11 + local-rule formatting; Circuit / Chancery / General Sessions; Davidson / Shelby / Knox / Hamilton venues + General Sessions + split family/juvenile; four subject bundles. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: mi-court-docs
plugins.description: Michigan court documents: MCR 1.109 / 2.113 formatting; Wayne + Oakland Circuit + 36th District + family division; six subject bundles. Full detail in the plugin README.

plugins.name: az-court-docs
plugins.description: Arizona court documents: Ariz. R. Civ. P. 10 / 7.1 formatting; Maricopa + Pima Superior + Justice Courts + family department; six subject bundles. Full detail in the plugin README.
